subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Your letters arrived, and the communications you sent forth were received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال مبارک نامه های شما رسید و مکاتیب که ارسال نمودید واصل کردید دو
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
